element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns projectile aiming with mouse; rock bags found throughout
Elixir bottles provide one-time antidote to bites; enemy pressure increases with difficulty
Vertical navigation mechanic for accessing different castle areas
Marked door signals location; required for Black Knight encounter
Powerful projectile weapon; required for Black Knight encounter
Multiple levers must be pulled to topple Black Knight throne; final puzzle mechanic
Duncan circles and mumbles incoherently, creating vulnerability window
Falling into holes leads to Trouble 3; strategic on harder difficulties for resource gathering
Requires collected Shield and Fireball; ends with gargoyle carrying Duncan away

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching rest areas between enemy clusters
Door selection creating safe navigation paths
typical_tension_triggers: Rat and bat encounters without ammunition
Floor hole proximity (falling to Trouble 3 dungeon)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical exploration-based pacing with optional branching paths creating player-controlled tension management; difficulty scaling across three skill levels maintains rhythm control

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Four doors in Great Hall marked with visual indicators (shield icon, fireball icon); center door leads directly to Black Knight; side doors randomize between Trouble and Fireball sequences, creating optional/alternate pathways
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Falling into floor holes strategically leads to Trouble 3 dungeon for resource gathering; this serves as hidden optional content on harder difficulties

difficulty_curve.early_game: Great Hall door selection establishes low-pressure entry point with safe movement tutorial; initial enemy encounters introduce bat/rat threats gradually
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Fireball and Shield sequences present moderate intensity with puzzle-solving and enemy density increase; Trouble path creates escalating hazard complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Black Knight sequence concentrates all mechanics (lever puzzles, boss encounters, max enemy pressure); Advanced skill level adds surprise enemy placements
notable_spikes: First rat/bat encounter without elixir knowledge
Black Knight 1-3 lever puzzle sequence under enemy pressure
Advanced skill level surprise enemy additions
Final Black Knight throne toppling with multiple lever coordination

notable_level_patterns.description: Shield and Fireball are located behind dedicated optional door sequences; player must complete these paths to gain required items before Black Knight encounter. Creates strategic routing choice.
Falling into floor holes leads to Trouble 3 dungeon (negative on easier difficulties, but creates rock/elixir gathering opportunity on harder difficulties). Inverts traditional failure consequence.
Two of the four Great Hall doors randomize their destinations (Trouble vs Fireball), creating variance in session progression and exploration discovery
Black Knight defeat requires pulling multiple levers distributed across Black Knight 1-3 levels; enforces sequential progression and adds spatial puzzle component to boss encounter
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Black Knight 1, Black Knight 2, Black Knight 3
